name: Doris Mcfatridge's Chocolate-Cherry Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 can (12oz) Skimmed Evaporated Milk (NOT Sweetened Condensed Milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 13x9-inch baking dish with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a bowl, stir the cake mix and evaporated milk until the mixture is just moistened.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
5. Evenly pour the cherry pie filling over the batter (most of the fruit will sink).
6. Bake for 30 minutes.
7. Sprinkle with chopped walnuts.
8. Continue baking for 20 more minutes, or until the nuts are toasted.
Per serving: 387 calories, 7g protein, 52g carbohydrates, 17g fat, 54mg cholesterol, 417mg sodium.
